title: Evidence Matters: Why the UWWTD Needs an Urgent Rethink [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe does not have to choose between environmental protection and access to medicines. Evidence must guide policymaking. Without an urgent pause and thorough impact assessment, the UWWTD risks unintended consequences on medicines supplies and the sustainability of EU’s healthcare systems.
